seoTitle: Pasadena ISD Calendar 2025-2026: Key Dates & Holidays
seoDescription: Pasadena ISD 2025-2026 calendar summary with Aug 18 first day, winter break, spring break, key holidays, and local reference notes.
calendarNotes: Pasadena ISD did not provide an official 2025-2026 PDF URL with this source package. This summary uses the official Pasadena ISD calendar page together with a local reference PDF created from calendar information. Because the reference PDF lists June 5, 2026 as a final teacher/pupil-free date rather than a separate last student day, families should confirm end-of-year details with Pasadena ISD or their campus.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Pasadena ISD start school in 2025?
calendarFaqs.a: The local 2025-2026 reference calendar lists Monday, August 18, 2025 as the first day for students.

calendarFaqs.q: Is there an official Pasadena ISD 2025-2026 PDF link?
calendarFaqs.a: No official 2025-2026 PDF URL was provided. MySchoolDates summarizes the official calendar page and a local reference PDF, so families should verify details with Pasadena ISD before making final plans.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Pasadena ISD Spring Break in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The local reference calendar lists Spring Break from Monday, April 6 through Friday, April 10, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Pasadena ISD begin the second semester in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The local reference calendar lists Monday, January 5, 2026 as the first day of the second semester.

yearNumbers.label: First Student Day
yearNumbers.detail: The local reference calendar lists August 18, 2025 as the first day for students.

yearNumbers.label: Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break is listed for April 6-10, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: Official PDF URL
yearNumbers.detail: No official Pasadena ISD 2025-2026 PDF URL was provided with the source information.
